summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that Cautilus report views make stale, blocked, and missing evidence visible, and that the public claim workflow keeps proof debt visible.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: claim status Markdown report and browser review surface
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only stale/blocked/missing-evidence visibility in claim status reports and public proof-debt visibility are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every future report renderer has feature parity
Every HTML artifact family in Cautilus is covered by this bundle
All Cautilus readable views are packet-backed
All Markdown and HTML views explain the same state
Human review comments prove behavior claims
Unknown claims are resolved by the report itself

protectedBehaviors: claim status Markdown is a human-readable projection over current JSON packets
status report tells readers to use JSON packets as the audit source
scoreboard, action buckets, validation, eval plans, and refresh plans make proof debt and stale state visible
refresh-plan actions are treated as historical after the selected claim packet has been regenerated
browser review server renders Markdown sections without mutating the source report
browser review comments are saved to a separate JSON packet
stale saved comments are ignored when the report fingerprint changes

decision.reason: Focused status-report and browser-review tests prove packet-backed readable views, separate comment packets, stale comment rejection, visible proof-debt buckets, validation summaries, and refresh-plan currentness.
